name: Scrapheap Shield
flavor_text: "Dented, corroded, and fused shut. Still stops a blade better than bare skin." —Subsurface Salvage Guide, Chapter 3
design_notes: A clean, simple colorless common artifact for the set. Equipment is the most natural fit for a vanilla-adjacent artifact at common — it has a single, straightforward effect (+0/+2) with a cheap equip cost. This supports the set's artifact-matters theme by being an artifact that creatures like Spore-Nest Forager, Spark Detonator, Cult Archivist, and Protonium Technician all trigger off of. The +0/+2 defensive stat boost is deliberately modest for common power level, and the {1} equip cost keeps it accessible without being pushed. It's the kind of ancient junk adventurers pull out of the dungeon — barely functional but better than nothing.
